initial_candidates.sql:
WITH violation_counts_2011 AS (
    SELECT 
        p.oaf_violation_category,
        COUNT(*) AS count_2011
    FROM parties p
    JOIN case_ids c ON p.case_id = c.case_id
    WHERE c.db_year = 2011
    GROUP BY p.oaf_violation_category
),
violation_counts_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        p.oaf_violation_category,
        COUNT(*) AS count_2021
    FROM parties p
    JOIN case_ids c ON p.case_id = c.case_id
    WHERE c.db_year = 2021
    GROUP BY p.oaf_violation_category
),
total_2011 AS (
    SELECT SUM(count_2011) AS total_2011_count
    FROM violation_counts_2011
),
total_2021 AS (
    SELECT SUM(count_2021) AS total_2021_count
    FROM violation_counts_2021
),
violation_shares AS (
    SELECT 
        v2011.oaf_violation_category,
        (v2011.count_2011 * 100.0 / t2011.total_2011_count) AS share_2011,
        (v2021.count_2021 * 100.0 / t2021.total_2021_count) AS share_2021
    FROM violation_counts_2011 v2011
    JOIN violation_counts_2021 v2021 ON v2011.oaf_violation_category = v2021.oaf_violation_category
    CROSS JOIN total_2011 t2011
    CROSS JOIN total_2021 t2021
),
most_common_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        oaf_violation_category,
        share_2011,
        share_2021
    FROM violation_shares
    ORDER BY share_2021 DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    share_2011 - share_2021 AS percentage_point_decrease
FROM most_common_2021;

WITH violation_counts_2011 AS (
    SELECT 
        p.oaf_violation_category,
        COUNT(*) AS count_2011
    FROM parties p
    JOIN case_ids c ON p.case_id = c.case_id
    WHERE c.db_year = 2011
    GROUP BY p.oaf_violation_category
),
violation_counts_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        p.oaf_violation_category,
        COUNT(*) AS count_2021
    FROM parties p
    JOIN case_ids c ON p.case_id = c.case_id
    WHERE c.db_year = 2021
    GROUP BY p.oaf_violation_category
),
total_2011 AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_cases_2011
    FROM parties p
    JOIN case_ids c ON p.case_id = c.case_id
    WHERE c.db_year = 2011
),
total_2021 AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_cases_2021
    FROM parties p
    JOIN case_ids c ON p.case_id = c.case_id
    WHERE c.db_year = 2021
),
violation_shares AS (
    SELECT 
        COALESCE(v2021.oaf_violation_category, v2011.oaf_violation_category) AS violation_category,
        COALESCE(v2021.count_2021, 0) AS count_2021,
        COALESCE(v2011.count_2011, 0) AS count_2011,
        t2021.total_cases_2021,
        t2011.total_cases_2011,
        (COALESCE(v2021.count_2021, 0) * 100.0 / t2021.total_cases_2021) AS share_2021,
        (COALESCE(v2011.count_2011, 0) * 100.0 / t2011.total_cases_2011) AS share_2011
    FROM violation_counts_2021 v2021
    FULL OUTER JOIN violation_counts_2011 v2011 ON v2021.oaf_violation_category = v2011.oaf_violation_category
    CROSS JOIN total_2021 t2021
    CROSS JOIN total_2011 t2011
),
most_common_2021 AS (
    SELECT violation_category, share_2021, share_2011
    FROM violation_shares
    ORDER BY count_2021 DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    CAST(share_2011 - share_2021 AS INTEGER) AS percentage_point_decrease
FROM most_common_2021;

WITH violation_counts_2011 AS (
    SELECT 
        p.oaf_violation_category,
        COUNT(*) AS count_2011
    FROM parties p
    JOIN case_ids c ON p.case_id = c.case_id
    WHERE c.db_year = 2011
    GROUP BY p.oaf_violation_category
),
violation_counts_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        p.oaf_violation_category,
        COUNT(*) AS count_2021
    FROM parties p
    JOIN case_ids c ON p.case_id = c.case_id
    WHERE c.db_year = 2021
    GROUP BY p.oaf_violation_category
),
total_2011 AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_2011 FROM parties p JOIN case_ids c ON p.case_id = c.case_id WHERE c.db_year = 2011
),
total_2021 AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_2021 FROM parties p JOIN case_ids c ON p.case_id = c.case_id WHERE c.db_year = 2021
),
violation_shares AS (
    SELECT 
        v2011.oaf_violation_category,
        (v2011.count_2011 * 100.0 / t2011.total_2011) AS share_2011,
        (v2021.count_2021 * 100.0 / t2021.total_2021) AS share_2021
    FROM violation_counts_2011 v2011
    JOIN violation_counts_2021 v2021 ON v2011.oaf_violation_category = v2021.oaf_violation_category
    CROSS JOIN total_2011 t2011
    CROSS JOIN total_2021 t2021
),
most_common_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        oaf_violation_category,
        share_2021,
        share_2011
    FROM violation_shares
    ORDER BY share_2021 DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    CAST(share_2011 - share_2021 AS INTEGER) AS percentage_point_decrease
FROM most_common_2021;

WITH violation_counts_2011 AS (
    SELECT 
        p.oaf_violation_category,
        COUNT(*) AS count_2011
    FROM parties p
    JOIN case_ids c ON p.case_id = c.case_id
    WHERE c.db_year = 2011
    GROUP BY p.oaf_violation_category
),
violation_counts_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        p.oaf_violation_category,
        COUNT(*) AS count_2021
    FROM parties p
    JOIN case_ids c ON p.case_id = c.case_id
    WHERE c.db_year = 2021
    GROUP BY p.oaf_violation_category
),
total_2011 AS (
    SELECT SUM(count_2011) AS total_2011_count
    FROM violation_counts_2011
),
total_2021 AS (
    SELECT SUM(count_2021) AS total_2021_count
    FROM violation_counts_2021
),
violation_shares AS (
    SELECT 
        v2011.oaf_violation_category,
        (v2011.count_2011 * 100.0 / t2011.total_2011_count) AS share_2011,
        (v2021.count_2021 * 100.0 / t2021.total_2021_count) AS share_2021
    FROM violation_counts_2011 v2011
    JOIN violation_counts_2021 v2021 ON v2011.oaf_violation_category = v2021.oaf_violation_category
    CROSS JOIN total_2011 t2011
    CROSS JOIN total_2021 t2021
),
top_violation_2021 AS (
    SELECT oaf_violation_category, share_2011, share_2021
    FROM violation_shares
    ORDER BY share_2021 DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    share_2011 - share_2021 AS percentage_point_decrease
FROM top_violation_2021;

WITH violation_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.oaf_violation_category,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN c.db_year = 2011 THEN 1 END) AS count_2011,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN c.db_year = 2021 THEN 1 END) AS count_2021,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE c.db_year = 2011) AS total_2011,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE c.db_year = 2021) AS total_2021
    FROM parties p
    JOIN case_ids c ON p.case_id = c.case_id
    WHERE c.db_year IN (2011, 2021)
    GROUP BY p.oaf_violation_category
),
top_violation_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        oaf_violation_category,
        count_2021,
        total_2021
    FROM violation_counts
    ORDER BY count_2021 DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
shares AS (
    SELECT 
        v.oaf_violation_category,
        (v.count_2011 * 100.0 / v.total_2011) AS share_2011,
        (v.count_2021 * 100.0 / v.total_2021) AS share_2021
    FROM violation_counts v
    WHERE v.oaf_violation_category = (SELECT oaf_violation_category FROM top_violation_2021)
)
SELECT 
    share_2011 - share_2021 AS percentage_point_decrease
FROM shares;
